This is a wdspec test.
[FAIL] test_cookie_path[/]
  webdriver.bidi.error.UnknownCommandException: unknown command (Unknown command 'storage.setCookie'.)
[FAIL] test_cookie_path[/some_path]
  webdriver.bidi.error.UnknownCommandException: unknown command (Unknown command 'storage.setCookie'.)
[FAIL] test_cookie_path[/some/nested/path]
  webdriver.bidi.error.UnknownCommandException: unknown command (Unknown command 'storage.setCookie'.)
Harness: the test ran to completion.
